characters.name: Alessandra
characters.description: InformationGenderFemaleSpeciesTigerStatusAliveFriends/AlliesCocoEnemiesPuss in Boots(inPuss in Book: Trapped in an Epic Tale)Love InterestPuss in BootsDetailsVoiced byGrey GriffinFirst AppearancePrey TimeLast AppearancePuss in Book: Trapped in an Epic Tale Alessandrais a tiger fromSegoviaand was an old love interest ofPuss in Boots. She was able to find Puss and take him to her island in the middle of the ocean while Puss is knocked out. She's a tall tiger, strong in stature, she has brown leather armor and gloves, a green vest, and bow and arrows in a case on her back. She also originally wore a brown headgear to conceal her identity from her prey. She also wears a yellow flower behind her ear before meeting Puss. She's fiery when crossed.
characters.personality_section: She's fiery when crossed.

characters.name: Artephius
characters.description: ArtephiusInformationAlias(s)SiGenderMaleSpeciesHumanOccupationAlchemistMaking Owl MacrameAffiliationsSan Lorenzo(serves town)StatusAliveAge1000ResidenceSan LorenzoFamilyMr. Funny-Looking-Old-Man (father)Friends/AlliesPuss In BootsDulcineaOrphansPajunaMayor TemerosoSeñora ZapataEnemiesFartholomew FishflingerBloodwolfLove InterestDuchessPersonal InformationLikesMacrame OwlsGiving People A ChanceDislikesMouse attacking him by insultingDetailsVoiced byPaul RuggFirst Appearance"Hidden"Last Appearance"The Moving Finger Writes" Artephiusalso known asSiis an old man who is an alchemist and a main character inThe Adventures of Puss in Boots. He is voiced byPaul Rugg. He is known for mostly nonsense and macrame owls, but has liking for magic and alchemy. Artephius is a lanky old man who wears a blue robe and a hat, brown slippers, and he has a white beard and hair, yet his eyebrows are grey. His robe is worn and has several visible holes repaired by cloth and fabric patches. Artephius is old and senile, tending to repeat and also not having much common sense, and being crazily forgetful. He can actually also be smart and intelligent at times, being an alchemist. Despite having power, he chooses not to use it because of power corrupts. He is protective of the town and believes people will be good to give them a chance. Because he is generally senile and crazy, people tend not to believe him, such as in episode 11, where everyone believed he was crazy when he said the mouse was actually the evil wizardFartholomew Fishflinger. This is despite his occasional moments of clarity. He commonly hides items in his blue robe. He is also very eccentric. When Artephius babysat the orphans, he did not discourage their singing, even after they added explosives, in fact, he further encouraged it! He adores macramé, particularly owls. In hisshophe hangs many of his creations decorating his lab.
characters.personality_section: Artephius is old and senile, tending to repeat and also not having much common sense, and being crazily forgetful. characters.name: Babieca
characters.description: BabiecaInformationGenderMaleSpeciesHorseOccupationPuss in Boots'SteedAffiliationsPuss in BootsSenior Puss SquadStatusAliveResidenceSan LorenzoFamilyPuss in BootsFriends/AlliesPuss in BootsDulcineaTobyArtephiusEnemiesThe Blind KingDetailsVoiced byJohn Rhys-Davies(briefly)First AppearanceSphinxLast Appearance"And, Having Writ, Moves On" Senior Puss Squad BabiecaisPuss in Boots'horse. Despite acting like a normal horse, both Puss and Artephius can understand what he says. He is very intelligent and can be fairly sassy to the point of using foul language, judging by Puss's and Artephius's remarks. He does not like being told what to do unless they say please, showing he likes courtesy. He enjoys racing and competition. However, he is very loyal to Puss and as a result hates when people give him competition for Puss's attention, such as ephram in episode 12. In Season Five, he is given a voice for a short time once he is sent into the Netherworld.

characters.name: Baby Bear (Puss in Boots)
characters.description: Baby Bear, also calledBaby, is a major antagonist inPuss in Boots: The Last Wish. He is the son ofPapa BearandMama Bear, and the adoptive brother ofGoldilocks. All the Three Bears help Goldilocks in her campaign to grant her the Last Wish, thus coming into competition withPuss in Bootsand"Big" Jack Horner.  Baby Bear has a clear sibling rivalry withhis adoptive sister, though more than once he declared that she wasnothis sister and was just a "porridge-stealing orphan", indicating Baby was sore about Goldi invading their home and taking his things though it's possible he was jealous of Goldi being the "golden child" intheirfamily, making him second fiddle next to her in their parents' eyes. They argue very much like a brother and sister however and in spite of them constantly butting heads he typically, albeit begrudgingly, follows her lead and seemed to at least trust she knew what she was doing. His loyalty however is not blind, for unlike Mama and Papa, Baby could only put up with Goldi's bossiness for so long before he angrily confronted her, demanding she tell them what she wanted to wish for and was worth dragging them through everything they'd been through and the dangers they'd been in. Baby was shocked when Goldi admitted she wanted the wish to be with her real family, leaving Baby shocked and hurt. The fact Baby (along with their parents) still chose to help Goldi get the wish proves that in spite of their family drama Baby cared deeply for Goldi and she him when she passed up the wish to save him, and they reconciled once the adventure was over and Baby finally embraced Goldi truly as his sister and was pleased when she suggested he come up with their next big move: to take over"Big" Jack Horner's pastry factory in lieu of his demise. Baby had a bragging side in that he often bragged to those he and his family robbed that they'd been "indicted" by the Three Bears Crime Family.
characters.personality_section: Baby Bear has a clear sibling rivalry withhis adoptive sister, though more than once he declared that she wasnothis sister and was just a "porridge-stealing orphan", indicating Baby was sore about Goldi invading their home and taking his things though it's possible he was jealous of Goldi being the "golden child" intheirfamily, making him second fiddle next to her in their parents' eyes. Baby had a bragging side in that

characters.name: Big Jack Horner
characters.description: Big Jack HornerInformationFull NameJack Horner(middle name unknown)Alias(s)Little Jack Horner(formerly)Big Jack Horner(nickname; currently)GenderMaleSpeciesHumanOccupationPastry Chef(formerly)Crime Lord(currently)StatusDeceasedAgeUnknownFamilyMr. Horner(father)Mrs. Horner(mother)EnemiesPuss in BootsKitty SoftpawsPerritoGoldilocksThe Three Bears Crime FamilyEthical BugDetailsVoiced byJohn MulaneyFirst AppearancePuss in Boots: The Last WishLast AppearancePuss in Boots: The Last Wish Big Jack Horner(nickname; currently) Crime Lord(currently) "Big" Jack Horner is a cruel, sadistic, spoiled, heartless, and irredeemable megalomaniac, with a hungry personality, whose desire to control all magic in existence borders on obsession that stems from his petty jealousy of how his story is nothing more than a nursery rhyme compared to actual fairy tales, and bitterly recalls how people ignored him in favor of magical beings, like Pinocchio. As a result, he became obsessed with collecting and hoarding magical objects, weapons, tools, and even creatures or their parts (having a large collection of horns from baby unicorns) though Jack has little interest in what he collects other than their magical nature and usefulness, as he thought the Talking Cricket was a cursed locust and didn't even know what using his unicorn horns would do to his victims and was pleasantly surprised to see them burst into glitter and confetti (which also killed them). He also hates being reminded of his nursery rhyme, as he killed one of the Serpent Sisters in cold blood by using the Midas Touch to turn her into gold after she stupidly recited his rhyme, as well as a twisted play on his promise to reward them with "their weight in gold". He cares nothing for the lives of others, even those of his own subordinates, whom he views as disposable cannon fodder in his quest for power. Even more vile is that he has no appreciation for the good things in his life, as he claimed to have not much as a boy other than "loving parents, stability, a mansion, and a thriving baked goods enterprise for him to inherit", even calling them "useless crap". When the Talking Cricket denounces Jack as an "irredeemable monster", Jack doesn’t deny it at all and even calls the Cricket an "idiot" for taking so long to realize it. This indicates that Jack has full awareness of his vile actions and has no remorse for the pain he has caused. His vile behavior/nature and obsession with both the star and map led him to his own demise.

characters.name: Bloarg
characters.description: BloargInformationGenderUnknownSpeciesFishStatusAliveDetailsFirst AppearanceCat FishLast AppearanceCat Fish TheBloargis a small grey fish which is unleashed by the emperor ofSunderland:Keith, to punish outlaws. The Bloarg is a small grey fish with darker grey fins with lighter grey spots. Its eyes are solid red and it has Indian red spots across its body.

characters.name: Blueberry
characters.description: Information presented in this article requires clearer citation.The origin of some of the following information is unclear and may be speculative, inaccurate and/or non-canonical. InformationGenderMaleSpeciesImpOccupationServingThe Blind KingStatusUnknownResidenceNetherworldFamilyTiny TuffsFriends/AlliesThe Blind KingRaspberryBoysenberryTomToby(formerly)EnemiesPuss in BootsDulcineaTobyAll enemies of Blind KingPersonal InformationLikesRudeMeanDestructionCorruptBad boysDetailsVoiced byDamian O'HareFirst AppearanceSwine and RosesLast AppearanceSwine and Roses RaspberryBoysenberryTomToby(formerly) Blueberry is an imp from a group called "Tiny Tuffs" and is the defacto leader. He is loyal to his king. He finds the insecurity of different people and exploits it like when he exploited Toby by calling him cool and giving the yarn to puss causing him to make the wrong decision of lettingTobyhang out with the tiny tuffs. Like his fellow imps he is quite confident like when he was in the challenge with Toby, he never thought that he will loose. He is spoilt, valuing premium, artesian goods and influences others to act like himself. After he exploits Toby he forces him emotionally to insult his friends. He is mischievous, enjoying playing tricks on people and destroying property, demonstrated by him destroying Eames sausages and other properties. Blueberry, like his three companions, is a servant of The Blind King and is devoted to fulfilling the mission given to the Imps by their master.

characters.name: Brad
characters.description: Bradis a merman who first appears in Season 2, Episode 3 "Mermaid". He is the boyfriend and later spouse ofFeejee. In the episode, he arrives just beforePussproclaims his wedding vow to Feejee, and demands that the wedding be stopped. He crawls toward Feejee and the two embrace, and he tells everyone that he never thought Feejee would ever find another man to make him jealous, swatting away Puss with his tail when he protests about her forcing him to marry her is all a ruse. He proposes to Feejee and she accepts, and the two kiss (much to the townspeople's disgust). They then slither and flop away together, as Puss looks on and tells them he may visit sometime. Contrasting his wife, he is a patient and kind merman. He demonstrates this with his friendly and affectionate attitude towards others in general. He has his limits with how much flak he can take, but still loves his family regardless.
characters.personality_section: Contrasting his wife, he is a patient and kind merman. He demonstrates this with his friendly and affectionate attitude towards others in general. He has his limits with how much flak he can take, but still loves his family regardless.

characters.name: Brandt, Dom, Chad and Lamar
characters.description: Dom: Mikey Kelley Chad: Adam McArthur Lamar: Robbie Rist They are all annoying bullies who do whatever they want, even if it means hurting others. They are all relatively stupid and manipulative. Brandt claims to be the cute one, Dom claims to be the bad one. Chad claim to be the sporty one. Lamar claims to be the prankster.

characters.name: Carla Jimenez
characters.description: Carla JimenezBirthdayMay 14, 1974BirthplaceWestwood, Los Angeles, CaliforniaCharacterSeñora ZapataCarla Jimenez(born May 14, 1974 in Westwood, Los Angeles, California) is an American television and film actress. She has had roles in series such asLincoln Heights,My Name Is EarlandLittle Britain USA, and has appeared in films includingMiss March(2009) andPhat Girlz(2006). She is of Costa Rican and Mexican descent. Jimenez has appeared in such feature films asNacho Libre,Lady in the Water, andAccepted. In 2003, Jimenez appeared as a character named Virginia, in the independent cult filmMy Life with Morrisseyby Andrew Overtoom. She was a recurring character on the ABC TV showsDesperate Housewives, Better Off TedandLast Man Standing. She also played the recurring role of Rosa onRaising Hope.

characters.name: Cleevil
characters.description: InformationGenderFemaleSpeciesGoblinAffiliationsSan Lorenzo OrphanageStatusAliveAge1000+ResidenceSan LorenzoFriends/AlliesPussDulcineaOrphansSenior Puss SquadArtephiusEnemiesDuchess(formerly)BloodwolfLove InterestTobyPersonal InformationLikesDodgeballDislikesMistreatmentDetailsVoiced byCandi MiloFirst AppearanceGoblinLast AppearanceAnd, Having Writ, Moves On DulcineaOrphansSenior Puss SquadArtephius Bloodwolf Cleevil is a tough, brash, sassy, energetic, playful, rebellious, over confident tomboy who is street smart but kind and loyal to friends. She tends to be mischevious and rowdy, playing a more violent game of dodge ball than what the other kids played and playing an obnoxious goblin flute. She also has a fierce temper, especially since she has been misjudged and mistreated simply because of the common misconception that goblins were evil. Because of this, when she feels threatened or insulted as Vina initially did during their first encounter, she will become enraged and attack whoever or whatever attacks her. Despite this, she is good natured and wants to live in a place where she can feel accepted. While still somewhat mischevious, she is good and helpful and protective of her friends, seeing them as family and finally finding a place to call home. Because of her past, she initially dislikes authority as authoritarian figures often kicked her out of towns and while she still has some difficulty following the rules and retains a slight dislike of adults, she has become much more well behaved and kind. She idolizes Puss and sees him as a hero and a good friend, and Puss likes her as well, since she reminds him a lot of himself as a child, especially since the two of them both share checkered past of rejection and ostracization. She also seems to view Dulcinea as a mother figure, often listening to what she says and getting along with her. Interestingly, despite being a tomboy she has an obsession with being a princess, most likely because princesses are well loved and live a comfortable life in a large castle with lots of money, which may relate to living a poor life on the run as an unwanted orphan.
